justification: Boundaries correct (10→heavy, 50→freight). All 5 ACs covered with explicit AC-to-test mapping in acceptance_criteria_coverage. No external dependencies. No features beyond spec. Confidence level 99 >= 85. Additional boundary tests (9.99, 49.99, 1000, -1) demonstrate thoroughness without adding unrequested features.

observations.text: All 5 acceptance criteria explicitly mapped to named tests with correct boundary logic
Extra boundary guards (9.99, 49.99, 1000, -1) add coverage without scope creep
No external dependencies, pure function approach
Deviations and escalations arrays empty, confirming spec-faithful implementation
Assumptions are reasonable and clearly documented
